{{Infobox location
| name = Sundown Pavilion
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sundown Pavilion]] is a four-story restaurant in [[Ninecloud City]] lit by red-and-orange constructs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] had a reservation at the [[Sundown Pavilion]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sundown Pavilion]] is a location where [[Yerin]] saw herself across the table from [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
